channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: A man traveling at 120 miles per hour on the interstate was stopped by highway police. “Sorry, Officer,” said the driver. “Was I driving too fast?"
item.description:
A man traveling at 120 miles per hour on the interstate was stopped by highway police. “Sorry, Officer,” said the driver. “Was I driving too fast?"
“No, sir. You were flying too low.”

item.title: Did you hear about the calendar thief?
item.description:
Did you hear about the calendar thief?
He got twelve months; they say his days are numbered!

item.title: Why would Snow White make a great judge?
item.description:
Why would Snow White make a great judge?
Because she is the fairest of them all.

item.title: Why did the dermatologist hurry to the jail?
item.description:
Why did the dermatologist hurry to the jail?
Everyone was breaking out.

item.title: Son: Mom, Dad left for work without his glasses, didn’t he?
item.description:
Son: Mom, Dad left for work without his glasses, didn’t he?
Mom: Yes. How did you know? Son: The garage door is missing.

item.title: Passenger: Are you sure this train stops at San Francisco?
item.description:
Passenger: Are you sure this train stops at San Francisco?
Conductor: If it doesn’t, you’ll hear an awful splash.

item.title: What do you put in a barrel to make it lighter?
item.description:
What do you put in a barrel to make it lighter?
A hole.

item.title: What did Snow White say when her photos didn’t come back from the photo store?
item.description:
What did Snow White say when her photos didn’t come back from the photo store?
“Some day my prints will come!”

item.title: What did the bald man say when he received a comb for his birthday?
item.description:
What did the bald man say when he received a comb for his birthday?
“Thank you very much. I’ll never part with it.”

item.title: What is the only thing you break when you say its name?
item.description:
What is the only thing you break when you say its name?
Silence.
